2603.20695.title: Can I guess where you are from? Modeling dialectal morphosyntactic similarities in Brazilian Portuguese
2603.20695.paper_summary: This paper investigates morphosyntactic covariation in Brazilian Portuguese (BP) to assess whether dialectal origin can be inferred from the combined behavior of linguistic variables. Focusing on four grammatical phenomena related to pronouns, correlation and clustering methods are applied to model covariation and dialectal distribution. The results indicate that correlation captures only limited pairwise associations, whereas clustering reveals speaker groupings that reflect regional dialectal patterns. Despite the methodological constraints imposed by differences in sample size requirements between sociolinguistics and computational approaches, the study highlights the importance of interdisciplinary research. Developing fair and inclusive language technologies that respect dialectal diversity outweighs the challenges of integrating these fields.
2603.20695.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文探討巴西葡萄牙語（BP）中的形態句法共變，以評估是否可以從語言變數的綜合行為推斷方言來源。<lb/>專注於與代詞相關的四個語法現象，應用相關性和聚類方法來建模共變和方言分佈。<lb/>結果表明，相關性僅捕捉到有限的成對關聯，而聚類則揭示了反映區域方言模式的說話者分組。<lb/>儘管社會語言學和計算方法之間的樣本大小要求存在方法論上的限制，該研究強調了跨學科研究的重要性。<lb/>開發尊重方言多樣性的公平和包容性語言技術，超越了整合這些領域的挑戰。
2603.20695.author: Manoel Siqueira et.al.
